GYEON Coating Applicator w/ Plastic Barrier

DEDICATED SOFT COATING APPLICATOR

Designed entirely for coating application in mind, the Q²M Coating Applicator are our takes in soft sponge applicator. Its double-sided structure offers a suede side for precise application and a short hair microfiber style on the other side. No sharp edges, no risk of damage.

PRECISE AND HANDY

Q²M CoatingApplicator has been designed to allow both enthusiast and professional, a safer and faster coating application on all types of surfaces. 2 types of high-quality microfibres are seamlessly wrapped around a high-density sponge for maximum precision and safety.

Suede on one side, short pile microfiber on the other.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Coating Applicator 2 Pack - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Coating Applicator 2 Pack

Price: $14.99

Quantity Discounts: 2+ at $13.99 (7% savings)

Product Information:
- Soft sponge applicator
- Double-sided, suede construction
- Two-pack
- Product Code: GY-1046

Customer Reviews: 100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 1 rating)

Product Description:

The Gyeon Coating Applicator 2 Pack is a soft applicator designed for easy coating application. It is double sided and very soft to ensure safe applications. It offers a suede side for precise application and a short hair microfiber style on the other side. There are no rough edges and virtually no risk of damage. It comes in a two-pack, so you have multiple applicators for each coating application.

Measures: 5" x 3" x 1.25"

From The Label:

Product Description:
The perfect size and shape to effectively apply ceramic coatings to painted surfaces. Two types microfibre allow you to adjust to the characteristics of the paintwork. Even application on complex shaped panels.

Do not reuse.

Customer Reviews:

Reviewed by Jon G. on 5/9/2024 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
These are roughly twice the size of the pads that come with Gyeon MOHS kits. One side is the suede and the other is the terry.

Images:
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Coating-Applicator-2-Pack_2461_1_lw_2915.jpg

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Coating Applicator 2-pack – safe & precise application
sources.cleaned_content:
Q²M Coating Applicator - 2-pack

Brand: GYEON
Art. nr. GY-CA-2-pack

Rating: 5.0 (5 reviews)

Price: € 13.99

In stock

Product Features:
- 2-pack zachte applicators om coating aan te brengen
- Heeft twee verschillende zijdes
- Geen scherpe randen
- Maximale precisie en veiligheid

Description:

De Gyeon Q²M Coating Applicator - 2-pack is een set van 2 zachte applicators die speciaal ontwikkeld zijn om coatings aan te brengen. De applicator heeft twee zijdes, een suède kant voor een precieze toepassing en een normale, hooggsm laagpolige microvezel (zoals de Q²M BaldWipe) aan de andere kant. De applicator heeft geen scherpe randen, hierdoor heb je geen kans op beschadigingen.

De Q²M Coating Applicator is ontworpen om zowel enthousiaste als professionele gebruikers te helpen om op een veiligere en snellere manier een coating op alle soorten oppervlakken aan te kunnen brengen. Twee soorten microvezels van hoge kwaliteit zijn naadloos gewikkeld rond een spons met hoge dichtheid voor maximale precisie en veiligheid.

Specifications:
- Product number: GY-CA-2-pack
- 2-pack applicators

Customer Reviews:

Makkelijk in gebruik - Frank - 16/05/2025
Gebruikt om fabriccoat op de stoelen aan te brengen, met de suède zijde. Neemt het product goed op, makkelijk aan te brengen (uitwrijven met handschoen). Werkt perfect!

De beste applicator - A M - 24/03/2025
Gebruik 1tje voor de graphene lak coating aan te brengen, de ander voor de gyeon fabric coating om de stoelen en matjes te coaten. Toppers!

Fijne applicator - Mick - 23/03/2025
Het is een fijne applicator die goed in de hand ligt en het product goed evenredig verspreidt. Zelf heb ik verschillende Gyeon coatings aangebracht met deze applicator. Voor mij is het ook een plus dat de applicator vierkant is, handig voor hoekjes.

Images:
- https://cdn.qso.eu/media/4b/e2/35/1758872629/q2m-coating-applicator_3000_3-pixelcut.png?ts=1758872644

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q²M Coating Applicator (Pack of 2) | Sealant Applicator
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q²M Coating Applicator (Pack of 2 or 10)

Brand: GYEON
Product code: GCA2

Selected Size: 10 Pack / 2 Pack

Awaiting Stock

Precision Tool for Flawless Coating Application!

Achieve streak-free, professional-grade results with the GYEON Q²M Coating Applicator—a dual-sided, high-density sponge tool designed specifically for ceramic coatings, sealants, and protective treatments. Its suede + short-pile microfiber design ensures even spreading, zero absorption, and no sharp edges, making it the safest choice for paint, wheels, glass, and trim.

Perfect for enthusiasts and detailers, this applicator eliminates waste and simplifies coating application—whether you're working on a daily driver or show car.

Why Choose GYEON Q²M Coating Applicator?

- Dual-Sided Design – Suede side for precision | Microfiber side for smooth leveling.
- Zero Product Absorption – Inner liner prevents soaking, saving coating material.
- No Sharp Edges – Rounded shape prevents scratches on delicate surfaces.
- Multi-Surface Use – Perfect for paint, glass, wheels, and trim coatings.
- Pro Efficiency – Available in 2-pack (DIY) or 10-pack (professional).

Features:
- High-Density Sponge Core – For controlled, even application.
- Seamless Microfiber Wrap – No loose fibers or shedding.
- Compact & Ergonomic – Fits comfortably in hand for extended use.
- Reusable – Clean with GYEON Q²M Prep for multiple applications.

Specification:
- Top: Suede (for precise application)
- Bottom: Short-pile microfiber (for smoothing)
- Compatible with all GYEON coatings (Q² Syncro, Skin, etc.)
- Sealants, wheel coatings, and glass treatments

How To Use:
- Prime the Applicator – Apply 2-3 drops of coating to the suede side.
- Spread Thinly – Use crosshatch motions for even coverage.
- Level with Microfiber Side – Buff gently to eliminate high spots.
- Clean After Use – Rinse with isopropyl alcohol or GYEON Prep.

Pro Tip: For large panels, work in 2x2 ft sections—the suede side ensures no puddling or waste.

Available Sizes: 2 Pack or 10 Pack

Images:
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/21211-700-700/q-c2-b2m-coating-applicator.png
